## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Clear owner and scope agreed in the issue thread if ambiguous.
- [ ] Change is verifiable: tests, screenshots, or written QA steps in the PR.
- [ ] No new duplicate abstractions without a one-line note explaining why.
